jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Abbott India
jsonLd.description:
Abbott India has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Kolkata office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Abbott India:
Abbott India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Abbott India!
